summary: Testing of SnapRoad P0 fix (user state reset) and new features (premium dashboards, onboarding walkthrough). Backend: 6/6 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Most features working, 1 bug found with Skip Tour button.

ui_bugs.issue: Skip Tour button click does not close the modal - button is found and clicked but modal remains visible

action_items: Fix Skip Tour button on Partner and Admin dashboards - button click handler not triggering modal close
critical_code_review_comments: Session reset endpoint (/api/session/reset) working correctly - returns fresh user state with 0 gems, level 1, no redeemed offers
Login endpoint (/api/auth/login?role=driver) correctly resets driver state with fresh_state=true
Partner and Admin login do not reset state (as expected)
Welcome page auth modal with role selector (Driver/Partner/Admin) working correctly
Partner Dashboard onboarding walkthrough: Next button works, Get Started button works, Skip Tour button NOT working
Admin Dashboard onboarding walkthrough: Next button works, Start Managing button works, Skip Tour button NOT working
Driver App shows plan selection onboarding for fresh users (Basic $0/mo, Premium $10.99/mo with 35% OFF)
Premium glassmorphism UI visible on both Partner and Admin dashboards
test_credentials: No authentication required - uses mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Skip Tour button on Partner and Admin dashboards not working. The button is found and clicked but the modal doesn't close. The Next button and Get Started/Start Managing buttons work correctly. All backend session reset tests pass.
mocked_data_note: ALL DATA IS MOCKED - Backend uses in-memory mock data
